agribalyse.name_en: Soup, Asian-style with noodles, prepacked, to be reheated
agribalyse.name_fr: Soupe asiatique, avec pâtes, préemballée à réchauffer

ingredients_text: Noodle (78,4%) [WHEAT flour, palm fat, starch, salt, sugar, raising agents (potassium carbonates, sodium carbonates); stabilizers (cellulose gum, guar gum); turmeric, colour: riboflavins]; sauce pack (11,1%) [sugar, water, chili sauce (25%) (water, sugar, chili, garlic, salt, modified starch, tomato paste, acidity regulators (acetic acid, citric acid); preservative: potassium sorbate; flavouring), concentrated SOY sauce (13,4%) (water, SOYbean meal), modified starch, preservatives (potassium sorbate, sodium benzoate)]; dish base (8,3%) [refined palm oil, sugar, salt, fried shallot (10,4%), maltodextrin, SOYA paste powder (6,7%), (maltodextrin, SOY bean paste ( soy bean, salt, rice flour, WHEAT flour)), yeast extract, hydrolysed SOY protein, colour: plain caramel, seasoning mix "five flavours", SESAME oil, anti-caking agent silicon dioxide, flavour enhancers (disodium guanylate, disodium inosinate); acidity regulator: malic acid; fried shallots (2,2%): fried shallots, refined palm oil]
